_comment: Config for pedagogy_daily.py — deploys to CIRRUS config/sources-pedagogy.json. Podcast feeds resolved via iTunes lookup 2026-07-16; blog feeds validated where noted, Google News site-feeds used where direct RSS is dead.

digest._recipient_note: Phase A: Buddy reviews. Phase B: set recipient to Alyssa's address (on CIRRUS via vi) + cc Buddy — only on Buddy's explicit go.

rss.name: Science of reading news (via Google News)

podcasts.name: Reach All Readers (formerly Triple R Teaching)

technique_seeds: Repeated reading for fluency (with partner reading)
Explicit morphology instruction (prefixes, suffixes, roots)
Sentence combining for writing instruction
Choral and echo reading
Elkonin boxes / phoneme-grapheme mapping
Retrieval practice for vocabulary
Text structure mapping for comprehension (narrative and informational)
Dictation as a spelling-to-writing bridge
Decodable text practice for struggling decoders
Peer-assisted learning strategies (PALS)
Writing about reading (brief constructed responses)
Scarborough's Rope as a diagnostic lens for reading difficulties
AI-assisted writing feedback and revision cycles (emerging practice — honest about limits)
Structured Word Inquiry / morphology matrices and word sums (used in UK, Canada, Australia)
Disciplinary literacy: reading like a scientist/historian in grade 3
Sentence-level syntax instruction (The Writing Revolution approach)
Reader's theater with student self-recording for fluency self-assessment
Oral language / dialogic talk routines (EEF high-impact evidence, UK)
Culturally responsive and knowledge-building text sets
Handwriting-fluency links to composition quality (international evidence)
_comment_experience: 2026-07-16 (S38, Buddy): Alyssa is an EXPERIENCED teacher (10+ yrs). Digest pitched at veteran level — skip basics, surface emerging/innovative practices worldwide. Prompts in pedagogy_daily.py updated to match.
